pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling Java 21 source code or may fail with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-war-plugin may have compatibility issues with Java 21 or newer Maven versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of jacoco-maven-plugin may not support instrumenting or reporting for Java 21 classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace javax.annotation removed in Java 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation packages were removed from the JDK in Java 11, causing compile errors if code depends on them without an explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using the release flag ensures the compiled bytecode is compatible with the target Java version and avoids using APIs not available in that version.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Auth.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Auth.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ if the class implements Serializable.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Auth.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Auth.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Pers.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Pers.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ if the class implements Serializable.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Java 16+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields must be annotated with @Serial (or be in a module that allows it), otherwise a compile error occurs.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compile error.
